prompt: Neo-Chinese minimalist Oriental aesthetics × high-end commercial illustration, themed 'One Flower, One World'. Minimalist, ethereal, surreal Oriental mood. A giant lotus flower grows from a calm water surface, acting as a container. Inside is a glowing 3D miniature of Guangzhou, including Canton Tower, Zhujiang New Town, Liede Bridge, and the waterfront. City lights are warm gold against cold cyan-blue shadows. Background is a warm off-white paper texture with large white space. A tiny boat with a fisherwoman in red stands at the bottom, looking up. High-end CG quality with cinematic lighting and 8K details.
